stories:
The requirements are met. 

**Story 1: Secure Login**
As a student, I want to be able to log in to the attendance management system securely, so that I can access my attendance records.

Acceptance Criteria:
- The system has a secure authentication system.
- The system sends a password reset link to users when they forget their password.

**Story 2: Mobile Accessibility**
As a faculty, I want to be able to access the attendance management system from my mobile device, so that I can mark attendance on-the-go.

Acceptance Criteria:
- The system is accessible from desktop and mobile devices.
- The system has a responsive design for optimal user experience.

**Story 3: Student Attendance Tracking**
As a student, I want to be able to track my attendance records, so that I can stay on top of my attendance.

Acceptance Criteria:
- The system allows students to view their attendance records.
- The system generates attendance reports for students.

**Story 4: Reporting and Administrative Monitoring**
As an administrator, I want to be able to view attendance reports and monitor attendance records, so that I can make informed decisions.

Acceptance Criteria:
- The system generates attendance reports for administrators.
- The system allows administrators to view attendance records.

**Story 5: System Automation**
As a developer, I want the system to automate student attendance tracking, reporting, and administrative monitoring, so that I can reduce manual effort.

Acceptance Criteria:
- The system automates student attendance tracking.
- The system generates attendance reports automatically.
- The system allows administrators to view attendance records automatically.

**Story 6: Role-Based Access Control**
As a faculty, I want to be able to access features based on my role, so that I can perform my duties efficiently.

Acceptance Criteria:
- The system has role-based access control.
- The system restricts access to features based on user roles.

**Story 7: Testing and Reporting**
As a developer, I want the system to have a comprehensive testing and reporting system, so that I can ensure the system is reliable and efficient.

Acceptance Criteria:
- The system has a comprehensive testing system.
- The system generates testing reports.
- The system allows administrators to view testing reports.
